name: Marz
description: Marz by Ahmed Al Maghribi — A bold and captivating 60ml Arabian fragrance with rich, long-lasting notes perfect for evenings and special occasions.

name: Ahl
description: Ahl by Ahmed Al Maghribi — Warm and welcoming 60ml Arabian perfume, crafted for those who appreciate timeless fragrance traditions.

name: Kaaf
description: Kaaf by Ahmed Al Maghribi — A rich woody 100ml perfume with deep earthy undertones. Great value for everyday luxury wear.

name: Oud and Rose
description: Oud and Rose by Ahmed Al Maghribi — A romantic blend of deep oud and fresh roses in a 60ml bottle. Perfect for gifting.

name: Summer Oud
description: Summer Oud by Ahmed Al Maghribi — Light oud for warm days. 60ml bottle blending fresh citrus with classic oud for a modern twist.

name: Zumar
description: Zumar by Ahmed Al Maghribi — A masterpiece of perfumery in a 60ml bottle. Premium, rare blend reserved for connoisseurs.

name: Blu by Ahmed
description: Blu by Ahmed Al Maghribi — A refreshing 100ml fresh fragrance with aquatic and blue notes. Ideal for daily wear.

name: Bin Shaikh
description: Bin Shaikh by Ahmed Al Maghribi — Commanding and majestic 90ml woody perfume with strong sillage. A true statement fragrance.

name: Ignite Oud
description: Ignite Oud by Ahmed Al Maghribi — A fiery and intense 60ml oud fragrance that commands attention from the moment you enter the room.

name: Rawdah
description: Rawdah by Ahmed Al Maghribi — Inspired by lush gardens, this elegant 50ml floral perfume carries the essence of blooming roses and rare florals.

name: Oud Classic
description: Oud Classic by Ahmed Al Maghribi — A timeless 50ml oud perfume with traditional roots. Rich, warm, and deeply nostalgic.

name: Oud Couture
description: Oud Couture by Ahmed Al Maghribi — High-fashion oud in a 100ml bottle. A modern luxurious take on classical Arabian oud.

name: Rose Noir
description: Rose Noir by Ahmed Al Maghribi — A dramatic and seductive 75ml floral fragrance combining black rose with dark amber undertones.

name: Rawdah Attar
description: Rawdah Attar by Ahmed Al Maghribi — Pure 10ml concentrated attar of the iconic Rawdah garden scent. Alcohol-free, long-lasting.

name: Aswadi
description: Aswadi by Ahmed Al Maghribi — A rich and dark 10ml attar with powerful musky and oud notes. Pure oil, no alcohol.

name: Kiswah
description: Kiswah by Ahmed Al Maghribi — Named after the sacred cloth of the Kaaba, this 10ml attar is a spiritual and luxurious pure oil.

name: Musk Rijali
description: Musk Rijali by Ahmed Al Maghribi — A bold masculine musk in a 12ml concentrated attar. Clean, powerful, and long-lasting.

name: Rawdah Ahmed
description: Rawdah Ahmed — Signature 10ml attar from Ahmed brand. A pure floral-oud blend that embodies the luxury of Arabian perfumery.
